testcase.name: @BeforeClass configBC
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 145 Current browser version is 147.0.7727.57 with binary path C:\Program
